subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which We have sent down in truth, wherein We make mention of the party of God, those who have held fast to My mighty cord, O Muhammad-before-Hasan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق و نذکر فیه حزب الله الذین تمسکوا بحبلی المتین یا محمد قبل حسن
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Word of God is its own standard, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
